forecast.name: Today
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 47. Southwest wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy fog between midnight and 3am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 25. West wind around 7 mph.

weather_report:
Boston awakens this morning under a generous canvas of clarity, the vast sky painted in a serene blue, stretching from horizon to horizon. The air carries a gentle touch of warmth, whispering promises of a high near forty-seven, accompanied by the soft caress of a southwest wind, stirring leaves and lifting spirits as it dances through the city. Though the sun shines brightly, inviting local adventurers to step outside, the day retains a certain crispness befitting late February, suggesting one should don a layered ensemble—perhaps a cozy sweater beneath a light jacket, suitable for embracing the chill even as it begins to wane.

As twilight approaches, a cloak of cloudiness will begin to weave its way into the evening, bestowing a more subdued atmosphere. Expect patchy fog to emerge, lingering ghostlike between midnight and the wee hours, enhancing the quiet charm of the night. With a low settling around twenty-five, the evening encourages indoor pursuits, perhaps curling up with a good book or delving into that piece of writing you’ve meant to finish. An invigorating walk through the city, watching the lights twinkle against the dusk, offers an invigorating breath of fresh air, especially for those looking to escape the confines of home as the winds start to whisper secrets of the night.
